title: Arabicnemis
description: **_Arabicnemis_** is a monotypic genus of damselflies in the family Platycnemididae. Its only species, **_Arabicnemis caerulea_**, is endemic to the Arabian Peninsula, where it occurs in Oman, the United Arab Emirates, and Yemen
sources: Field guide to the dragonflies of Britain and Europe, Klaas-Douwe B Dijkstra.
